# TMS9900 Assembly Syntax Highlighting

Custom syntax highlighting for TMS9900/TI-99/4A assembly language files.

## Features

- Syntax highlighting for TMS9900 instruction mnemonics
- Register highlighting (R0-R15)
- Number formats (decimal, hex with `>` prefix, binary)
- Comments (semicolon and asterisk styles)
- Assembler directives (AORG, DATA, BYTE, TEXT, EQU, etc.)
- Label recognition

## Supported File Extensions

- `.a99` - Standard TMS9900 assembly files
- `.asm` - Generic assembly files

## Installation

This extension is automatically loaded from the `.vscode/extensions` folder.

To use it workspace-wide, you may need to reload VS Code.
